description: You are a simulation technician at a maritime training center. Your task is to create a new custom vessel model in Bridge Command for a VLCC (Very Large Crude Carrier) named 'MT Pacific Titan' at /opt/bridgecommand/Models/VLCC_Training/ and a training scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) VLCC Channel Approach/. The vessel model must include a boat.txt file with the following specifications: Length 330m, Beam 60m, Draft 21.5m, Mass 340,000 tonnes, 1 Engine, Max Speed 15.5 knots, Max Rudder 35 degrees, Rudder Speed 2.5 deg/sec, Astern Efficiency 0.3, Buffet Factor 0.2, Propeller Walk (Ahead -0.02, Astern 0.05), GPS (0, 40, 3), Depth Sounder (0, -150, -20), and Bridge View (0, 30, 160). Ensure the directory contains suitable 3D model files from an existing large ship. The scenario should use a daytime Solent/Channel environment, the new VLCC_Training model as the ownship, and at least 2 traffic vessels. Document the configured parameters in a report at /home/ga/Documents/vlcc_config_report.txt.
